Descripción completa: The Taj Mahal is a world-famous mausoleum built by Mughal emperor Shah Jahan in memory of his wife Mumtaz Mahal.
Machu Picchu is an ancient Inca city set high in the Andes Mountains, renowned for its archaeological significance and breathtaking views.
The Colosseum is a massive stone amphitheater in Rome, Italy, known for gladiatorial contests and public spectacles.
The Pyramids of Giza are monumental tombs built for Egyptian pharaohs, representing one of the greatest architectural feats of ancient times.
